text: vayehi bimey shefot hashofetim vayehi ra'av baarets vayelekh ish mibeyt lechem yehuda lagur bisedey movav hu veishetov usheney vanayv
veshem haish elimelekh veshem ishetov na'omi veshem sheney-vanayv ׀ machelovn vekhileyovn eferatim mibeyt lechem yehuda vayavou sedey-movav vayiheyu-sham
vayamat elimelekh ish na'omi vatishaer hi usheney vaneyha
vayiseu lahem nashim moaviyovt shem haachat 'arepa veshem hashenit rut vayeshevu sham ke'eser shanim
vayamutu gam-sheneyhem machelovn vekhileyovn vatishaer haisha misheney yeladeyha umeishah
vataqam hi vekhaloteyha vatashav misedey movav ki shame'a bisede movav ki-faqad yehva et-'amov latet lahem lachem
vatetse min-hamaqovm asher hayetah-shama ushetey khaloteyha 'imah vatelakhena vaderekh lashuv el-erets yehuda
vatomer na'omi lishetey khaloteyha lekhena shovena isha leveyt imah ya'ase kh ya'as q yehva 'imakhem chesed kaasher 'asitem 'im-hametim ve'imadi
yiten yehva lakhem umetsena menucha isha beyt ishah vatishaq lahen vatisena qovlan vativekeyna
vatomarenah-lah ki-itakh nashuv le'amekh
vatomer na'omi shovena venotay lama telakhena 'imi ha'ovd-li vanim beme'ay vehayu lakhem laanashim
shovena venotay lekhena ki zaqaneti miheyovt leish ki amareti yesh-li tiqeva gam hayiti halayela leish vegam yaladeti vanim
halahen ׀ tesaberena 'ad asher yigedalu halahen te'agena levileti heyovt leish al benotay ki-mar-li meod mikem ki-yatsea vi yad-yehva
vatisena qovlan vativekeyna 'ovd vatishaq 'arepa lachamovtah verut daveqa bah
vatomer hine shava yevimetekh el-'amah veel-eloheyha shuvi acharey yevimetekh
vatomer rut al-tifege'i-vi le'azevekh lashuv meacharayikh ki el-asher telekhi elekh uvaasher talini alin 'amekh 'ami velohayikh elohay
baasher tamuti amut vesham eqaver ko ya'ase yehva li vekho yosif ki hamavet yaferid beyni uveynekh
vatere ki-miteametset hi lalekhet itah vatechedal ledaber eleyha
vatelakhena sheteyhem 'ad-boana beyt lachem vayehi kevoana beyt lechem vatehom kal-ha'ir 'aleyhen vatomarena hazot na'omi
vatomer aleyhen al-tiqerena li na'omi qerena li mara ki-hemar shaday li meod
ani melea halakheti vereyqam heshivani yehva lama tiqerena li na'omi vayhva 'ana vi veshaday hera' li
vatashav na'omi verut hamovaviya khalatah 'imah hashava misedey movav vehema bau beyt lechem bitechilat qetsir se'orim
ulena'omi meyuda' kh movda' q leishah ish gibovr chayil mimishepachat elimelekh ushemov bo'az
vatomer rut hamovaviya el-na'omi elekhah-na hasade vaalaqota vashibolim achar asher emetsa-chen be'eynayv vatomer lah lekhi viti
vatelekh vatavov vatelaqet basade acharey haqotserim vayiqer miqereha cheleqat hasade levo'az asher mimishepachat elimelekh
vehineh-vo'az ba mibeyt lechem vayomer laqovtserim yehva 'imakhem vayomeru lov yevarekhekha yehva
vayomer bo'az lena'arov hanitsav 'al-haqovtserim lemi hana'ara hazot
vaya'an hana'ar hanitsav 'al-haqovtserim vayomar na'ara movaviya hi hashava 'im-na'omi misede movav
vatomer alaqotah-na veasafeti va'omarim acharey haqovtserim vatavov vata'amovd meaz haboqer ve'ad-'ata ze shivetah habayit me'at
vayomer bo'az el-rut halov shama'at biti al-telekhi lileqot besade acher vegam lo ta'avuri mize vekho tidebaqin 'im-na'arotay
'eynayikh basade asher-yiqetsorun vehalakhet achareyhen halov tsiviti et-hane'arim levileti nage'ekh vetsamit vehalakhet el-hakelim veshatit measher yisheavun hane'arim
vatipol 'al-paneyha vatishetachu aretsa vatomer elayv madu'a matsati chen be'eyneykha lehakireni veanokhi nakheriya
vaya'an bo'az vayomer lah huged hugad li kol asher-'asit et-chamovtekh acharey movt ishekh vata'azevi avikh veimekh veerets movladetekh vatelekhi el-'am asher lo-yada'at temovl shileshovm
yeshalem yehva pa'olekh utehi masekuretekh shelema me'im yehva elohey yiserael asher-bat lachasovt tachat-kenafayv
vatomer emetsa-chen be'eyneykha adoni ki nichametani vekhi dibareta 'al-lev shifechatekha veanokhi lo eheye keachat shifechoteykha
vayomer la vo'az le'et haokhel goshi halom veakhalet min-halechem vetavalet pitekh bachomets vateshev mitsad haqovtserim vayitsebat-lah qali vatokhal vatiseba' vatotar
vataqam lelaqet vayetsav bo'az et-ne'arayv lemor gam beyn ha'omarim telaqet velo takhelimuha
vegam shol-tasholu lah min-hatsevatim va'azavetem veliqeta velo tige'aru-vah
vatelaqet basade 'ad-ha'arev vatachebot et asher-liqeta vayehi keeyfa se'orim
vatisa vatavov ha'ir vatere chamovtah et asher-liqeta vatovtse vatiten-lah et asher-hovtira misave'ah
vatomer lah chamovtah eyfo liqatet hayovm veana 'asit yehi makirekh barukh vataged lachamovtah et asher-'aseta 'imov vatomer shem haish asher 'asiti 'imov hayovm bo'az
vatomer na'omi lekhalatah barukh hu layhva asher lo-'azav chasedov et-hachayim veet-hametim vatomer lah na'omi qarovv lanu haish migoalenu hu
vatomer rut hamovaviya gam ׀ ki-amar elay 'im-hane'arim asher-li tidebaqin 'ad im-kilu et kal-haqatsir asher-li
vatomer na'omi el-rut kalatah tovv biti ki tetsei 'im-na'arovtayv velo yifege'u-vakh besade acher
vatidebaq bena'arovt bo'az lelaqet 'ad-kelovt qetsir-hase'orim uqetsir hachitim vateshev et-chamovtah
vatomer lah na'omi chamovtah biti halo avaqesh-lakh manovcha asher yitav-lakh
ve'ata halo vo'az moda'etanu asher hayit et-na'arovtayv hineh-hu zore et-goren hase'orim halayela
verachatset ׀ vasakhet vesamet simelotekh kh simelotayikh q 'alayikh veyaradeti kh veyaradet q hagoren al-tivade'i laish 'ad kalotov leekhol velishetovt
vihi veshakhevov veyada'at et-hamaqovm asher yishekav-sham uvat vegilit maregelotayv veshakhaveti kh veshakhavet q vehu yagid lakh et asher ta'asin
vatomer eleyha kol asher-tomeri elay q e'ese
vatered hagoren vata'as kekhol asher-tsivata chamovtah
vayokhal bo'az vayeshet vayitav libov vayavo lishekav biqetse ha'arema vatavo valat vategal maregelotayv vatishekav
vayehi bachatsi halayela vayecherad haish vayilafet vehine isha shokhevet maregelotayv
vayomer mi-at vatomer anokhi rut amatekha ufaraseta khenafekha 'al-amatekha ki goel ata
vayomer berukha at layhva biti heytavet chasedekh haacharovn min-harishovn levileti-lekhet acharey habachurim im-dal veim-'ashir
ve'ata biti al-tirei kol asher-tomeri e'eseh-lakh ki yovde'a kal-sha'ar 'ami ki eshet chayil at
ve'ata ki amenam ki im kh goel anokhi vegam yesh goel qarovv mimeni
lini ׀ halayela vehaya vaboqer im-yigealekh tovv yigeal veim-lo yachepots legaolekh ugealetikh anokhi chay-yehva shikhevi 'ad-haboqer
vatishekav maregelatav kh maregelovtayv q 'ad-haboqer vataqam biterovm kh beterem q yakir ish et-re'ehu vayomer al-yivada' ki-vaa haisha hagoren
vayomer havi hamitepachat asher-'alayikh veechozi-vah vatochez bah vayamad shesh-se'orim vayashet 'aleyha vayavo ha'ir
vatavov el-chamovtah vatomer mi-at biti vataged-lah et kal-asher 'asah-lah haish
vatomer shesh-hase'orim haele natan li ki amar elay q al-tavovi reyqam el-chamovtekh
vatomer shevi viti 'ad asher tede'in eykh yipol davar ki lo yisheqot haish ki-im-kila hadavar hayovm
uvo'az 'ala hasha'ar vayeshev sham vehine hagoel 'over asher diber-bo'az vayomer sura shevah-po peloni alemoni vayasar vayeshev
vayiqach 'asara anashim miziqeney ha'ir vayomer shevu-fo vayeshevu
vayomer lagoel cheleqat hasade asher leachinu leelimelekh makhera na'omi hashava misede movav

vaani amareti egele azenekha lemor qene neged hayoshevim veneged ziqeney 'ami im-tigeal geal veim-lo yigeal hagida li veeda' kh veede'a q ki eyn zulatekha ligeovl veanokhi achareykha vayomer anokhi egeal
vayomer bo'az beyovm-qenovtekha hasade miyad na'omi umeet rut hamovaviya eshet-hamet qaniti kh qanita q lehaqim shem-hamet 'al-nachalatov
vayomer hagoel lo ukhal ligeovl kh ligeal-li q pen-ashechit et-nachalati geal-lekha ata et-geulati ki lo-ukhal ligeol
vezot lefanim beyiserael 'al-hageula ve'al-hatemura leqayem kal-davar shalaf ish na'alov venatan lere'ehu vezot hate'uda beyiserael
vayomer hagoel levo'az qeneh-lakh vayishelof na'alov
vayomer bo'az lazeqenim vekhal-ha'am 'edim atem hayovm ki qaniti et-kal-asher leelimelekh veet kal-asher lekhileyovn umachelovn miyad na'omi
vegam et-rut hamoaviya eshet machelovn qaniti li leisha lehaqim shem-hamet 'al-nachalatov velo-yikaret shem-hamet me'im echayv umisha'ar meqovmov 'edim atem hayovm
vayomeru kal-ha'am asher-basha'ar vehazeqenim 'edim yiten yehva et-haisha habaa el-beytekha kerachel ׀ ukhelea asher banu sheteyhem et-beyt yiserael va'aseh-chayil beeferata uqera-shem beveyt lachem
vihi veytekha keveyt perets asher-yaleda tamar lihuda min-hazera' asher yiten yehva lekha min-hana'ara hazot
vayiqach bo'az et-rut vatehi-lov leisha vayavo eleyha vayiten yehva lah herayovn vateled ben
vatomarena hanashim el-na'omi barukh yehva asher lo hishebit lakh goel hayovm veyiqare shemov beyiserael
vehaya lakh lemeshiv nefesh ulekhalekel et-seyvatekh ki khalatekh asher-ahevatekh yeladatu asher-hi tovva lakh mishive'a banim
vatiqach na'omi et-hayeled vateshitehu vecheyqah vatehi-lov leomenet
vatiqerena lov hashekhenovt shem lemor yulad-ben lena'omi vatiqerena shemov 'ovved hu avi-yishay avi david f
veele tovledovt parets perets hovlid et-chetserovn
vechetserovn hovlid et-ram veram hovlid et-'aminadav
ve'aminadav hovlid et-nacheshovn venacheshovn hovlid et-salema
vesalemovn hovlid et-bo'az uvo'az hovlid et-'ovved
ve'oved hovlid et-yishay veyishay hovlid et-david
